You Got Served (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $40,066,497Details
International Box Office $10,745,361
Worldwide Box Office $50,811,858
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,123,105 (40.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.49 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:78.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$8,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,933 opening theaters/1,943 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $77,165,107

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 30th, 2004 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: September 30th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: May 18th, 2004 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic elements and sexual references.
Running Time: 95 minutes
Franchise: You Got Served
Plot point: Dancing
Social setting: Hood Film
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
